title: phyllanthus heterophyllus
intro: Phyllanthus heterophyllus, also known as the Cheddi plant or the Manjishtha plant, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties, as well as the ability to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus heterophyllus is often used to make teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
